response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-01:12: Identified as intro and title card for Otonose Kanade's birthday live. 2. 01:13: Song '飛行艇' starts; on-screen text explicitly credits the music to Daiki Obita. 3. Used the search tool to find the full official lyrics for '飛行艇' by the original composer Daiki Obita, to ensure accuracy, and found corresponding English translations. 4. Mapped the performance scene from 01:13 to the end of the video.
response.global_summary: The video features a virtual live concert performance of the song '飛行艇' (Hikoutei) by Otonose Kanade, celebrating her birthday.

scenes.description: An introductory sequence featuring artistic puzzle imagery and a title card for 'Otonose Kanade IN PROGRESS BIRTHDAY LIVE 2026'. There is no vocal music.
Otonose Kanade performs '飛行艇' (Hikoutei) on stage. On-screen text credits the music to Daiki Obita. The scene ends as the song concludes.
